Add an entry to CHANGELOG.md under [Unreleased] before merging.

  ### Added      — new features

  ### Deprecated — features that will be removed in a future release
  ### Removed    — features removed in this release
  ### Fixed      — bug fixes
  ### Security   — security fixes (always include these)

  ### Fixed
  - Bot vote endpoint: pass `slot` object instead of `slot_id` UUID to `upsert_vote`
